# AgentDoor

> Open source tools for AI agents. Memory, model discovery, and secure messaging. Free, private, local.

AgentDoor is an open source toolkit for building and running AI agents. Three tools, all MIT licensed, all designed to keep your data on your machine.

Built by mVara — the company behind RELAY persistent memory for AI coding agents.

## Tools

- **Geniuz** ([site](https://geniuz.life), [GitHub](https://github.com/jackccrawford/Geniuz)) — Memory for Claude Desktop. Your Claude remembers preferences, decisions, and project context across sessions. Install in 2 minutes. Mac, Windows, Linux. Free.
- **Token Scout** ([page](https://agentdoor.ai/token-scout), [GitHub](https://github.com/jackccrawford/token-scout)) — Free and cheap LLM inference, found live. Discovers what's available right now across OpenRouter, Ollama, and your local GPUs. Routes your agent to the cheapest safe option automatically.
- **Sendblue MCP** ([page](https://agentdoor.ai/sendblue), [GitHub](https://github.com/jackccrawford/sendblue-mcp)) — SMS and iMessage for AI agents. Secure polling — no webhooks, no exposed endpoints, no attack surface. Built on Sendblue.

## Principles

- Open source, MIT licensed.
- Your data stays local.
- No telemetry, no upsells, no required accounts for the free tools.

## About

- [Home](https://agentdoor.ai): The three tools
- [mVara](https://mvara.ai): The company. Also makes RELAY persistent memory infrastructure for AI agents.
